lookalikes.prompt: A male-presenting individual in their late 40s with warm olive skin and subtle smile lines. He has a squared jawline, a prominent aquiline nose with a slight bump, and wide-set, round, deep brown eyes beneath straight, bushy dark eyebrows. His lips are thin and straight, pressed together in a thoughtful expression. He has short, curly dark brown hair with strands of gray at the temples. A neatly trimmed full beard with patches of gray covers his lower face. The overall appearance suggests a South Asian heritage. He is sitting on the edge of a stone fountain in a sunny public square, a full-body shot, his face visible and turned slightly towards the viewer. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.
